item.title: Download PhraseExpress 18.0.67
item.description: PhraseExpress is a useful application that helps users save time when typing frequently used text or commands. This application allows users to create shortcuts to automatically insert text quickly and conveniently. With PhraseExpress, users can create "templates" for common commands, regular emails, chat messages, or any text they have to retype frequently. With the multiple document interface you can monitor a number of slave Modbus and / or the zone data at the same time. For each window you simply specify the ID slave, Modbus, function, address, size, and proportion of poll. You can read and write registers and coils from any window. item.title: Download KILHO AutoClick 1.5.0

It allows users to define specific click points and automatically click at those locations. This tool is user-friendly and supports recording click sequences for repeated use. item.title: Download ExifTool 13.53
item.description: ExifTool is a library of Perl platform-independent plus a command line application for reading, writing, and editing meta information in various file types. ExifTool supports many metadata formats including EXIF , GPS , IPTC , XMP , JFIF , GeoTIFF , ICC Profile , Photoshop IRB , FlashPix , AFCP and ID3 , as well as notes of the manufacturer of many digital cameras by Canon , Casio , DJI , FLIR , FujiFilm , GE , GoPro , HP , JVC / Victor , Kodak , Leaf , Minolta / Konica-Minolta , Motorola...
